name: podsub.link
short_description: A zero-backend tool to generate shareable podcast subscription links for all major platforms
long_description: PodSub Links Generator is a static web application that creates shareable pages with platform-specific deep links for podcast RSS feeds. It features a dual-page architecture: a generator page where users input any podcast RSS feed URL, and a subscription landing page displaying platform buttons for Apple Podcasts, Overcast, Pocket Casts, Castro, Podcast Addict, Downcast, and others. The application includes QR code generation for easy mobile sharing, dark/light theme support, custom URL scheme configuration for unlisted podcast apps, and URL validation for various podcast hosting providers. Being pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript with no backend requirements, it can be deployed to any static hosting service and includes production build tools for minification and packaging.

modules.description: Generator page UI where users input podcast RSS feed URLs and receive shareable links with QR codes
Subscription landing page that displays platform-specific subscription buttons and feed details
Generator logic handling URL validation, link generation, QR code creation, and clipboard operations
Subscription page logic generating platform buttons with deep links, managing custom URL schemes, and feed URL display
Shared responsive styles with dark/light theme support, component styling for buttons, inputs, and layout
Development server that serves files from src directory with proper MIME type handling
Production build script that minifies HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and creates a deployable zip archive
